sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42542" key="e)ri/sfhlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρί-σφηλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n42542.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">overthrowing much,</tr_> of Heracles, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0292.tlg001:82" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stesich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">82</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
